signals.headline: India — DGFT pulse quota open

signals.headline: Germany — Bundeswehr €100B modernisation
signals.summary: Germany's massive defence modernisation creates the largest European procurement opportunity in decades, with CETA giving Canadian suppliers preferential access over non-EU competitors. Focus on radar
